headline: What Could Get Synopsys Stock Grinding Higher Again?
summary: After a period of underperformance, a pivotal but often overlooked part of the company's business is showing signs of a powerful new life.

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks to Consider Right Now
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is full of established businesses, but only some continue to outperform the market. A few standout companies are thriving thanks to strong fundamentals and sustained competitive advantages.
